emails.subject: Tonight
emails.body: Tonight Hey, bro. We're hitting the Front Porch for Happy Hour tonight if you're interested. The way I figure it, you might as well drink some good beer while you're still employed. PBR is just one credit downgrade away. Later. -M

emails.subject: RE: Tonight
emails.body: RE: Tonight hey thanks...i'll be there. just got back from Portland last night and am going through some FPP withdraw.... To: Smith, Matt

emails.subject: RE: Tonight
emails.body: See ya up there, amigo. I look fwd to hearing about the trip. -M To: Kelly, Mike E.
